items.title: Morgan Rogers completes record-breaking £117m Chelsea transfer from Aston Villa and becomes most expensive Brit ever
items.summary: MORGAN ROGERS has become the most expensive British player ever after completing a transfer to Chelsea. The England international has signed for the Blues from Aston Villa for £117million. Rogers, 23, has signed a six-year deal at Stamford Bridge with the option of a further year. He said: "I'm so e

items.title: Chelsea sign Rogers in record-breaking £117m deal
items.summary: Chelsea have completed the signing of Morgan Rogers from Aston Villa in a record-breaking £117m deal.

items.title: Liverpool owner FSG in talks to sell 30% stake to Amit Bhatia consortium for £1.35bn

items.title: Stones emerges as potential Chelsea target
items.summary: Free agent defender John Stones has emerged as a potential option for Chelsea in this transfer window.

items.title: Tearful ex-Newcastle star Shola Ameobi pays emotional tribute to Kevin Keegan as he views tributes at St James’ Park
items.summary: EX-NEWCASTLE star Shola Ameobi paid an emotional tribute to former boss Kevin Keegan yesterday after his tragic death. The ex-striker rubbed his eyes as he viewed a sea of flowers, scarves and footie tops left by fans at St James’ Park. Nigeria ace Shola, 44, spent 14 years at Newcastle, scoring 53

items.title: Enzo Fernandez: Argentina played with 'pride' and 'humility'
items.summary: Enzo Fernandez has praised Argentina for playing with "pride" and "humility" at the 2026 World Cup after it was confirmed FIFA will investigate the team's behaviour after the final.

items.title: Sturm Graz 4 Hearts 0: Champions League dream becomes a nightmare as awful defending costs Vrancken’s Jambos
items.summary: HAPHAZARD HEARTS couldn’t weather the Sturm as their Champions League hopes were blown away in Graz. New boss Wouter Vrancken set up the Jambos to have a go at the Austrians in his first game in charge. But a combination of poor defending and terrible finishing saw them on the end of a Euro hiding..

items.title: Cristiano Ronaldo ‘likes’ post claiming Fifa helped Lionel Messi’s Argentina reach World Cup final
items.summary: CRISTIANO RONALDO has appeared to like an Instagram post claiming that Fifa helped Argentina to the World Cup final. items.title: Chelsea sign £117m Rogers - what will he bring?
items.summary: Chelsea's £117m move for Aston Villa midfielder Morgan Rogers is a genuine transfer window shock - so how did they do it and what does it mean for the rest of the squad?

items.title: Forest make enquiry for Sporting's Diomande
items.summary: Sporting receives an enquiry from Nottingham Forest for centre-back Ousmane Diomande.

items.title: Man Utd accused of treating fans like ‘SUSPECTS’ as club blasted over season ticket clampdown in unprecedented statement
items.summary: MANCHESTER UNITED have been accused of treating supporters as “suspects” after thousands of season-ticket accounts were restricted.
